I Will Open My Mouth in Parables


(Matthew 13:34–35)

NoteMaskil is probably a musical or liturgical term; used for Psalms 32, 42, 44–45, 52–55, 74, 78, 88–89, and 142.
NoteOr from ancient times; see also LXX; cited in Matthew 13:35
NoteCited in John 6:31
NoteOr in vapor
NoteHebrew El-Elyon
NoteOr His hand —
NoteOr frost or driving rain
